title: Column Cleared automation
excerpt:
Having a when column is cleared automation would be incredibly useful. 
For example when column changed and value is cleared, then clear value within this other column.

posts.author: Alyssa (Alyssa Heinen)
posts.cookedHtml:
Having a when column is cleared automation would be incredibly useful.
For example when column changed and value is cleared, then clear value within this other column.

posts.author: KarenA (Karen Aiken)
posts.cookedHtml: Another use case - when column (sprint) is cleared, move to the “Backlog” group.
